caption:
What if the simplest thing you wear becomes the one you reach for every single day?

There is something about a piece that asks nothing of you — no fussing, no layering of thought — just fabric that moves the way you do, light as the air coming off the sea. This is how a season should begin: barefoot, unhurried, already halfway to somewhere beautiful. We love the way @nousaconcept understands that ease and intention can live in the very same seam.

Dress: @nousaconcept
